dialog.stepLabel: Qianyue: "Alright, I think I've probably got things figured out...."

items.speaker: Qianyue
items.text: Alright, I think I've probably got things figured out.

items.speaker: Qianyue
items.text: The Fractsidus calls this place "Site 2" and ran experiments with the "Photonvault" created by the Court of Savantae.

items.speaker: Qianyue
items.text: Those frozen animals? They must be the device's test subjects caught in time.

items.speaker: Qianyue
items.text: And the monsters at Loong's Crest must've been captured with it, too.

items.speaker: Qianyue
items.text: But what's their plan? The memo from Site 1 mentioned a frequency suppressor… What’s that for?

options.text: To suppress the Tacet Discords' innate frequencies?

items.speaker: Qianyue
items.text: Yes… So they can control them, like in the diary.

items.speaker: Qianyue
items.text: This is absurd...

options.text: It is their style, after all.

items.speaker: Qianyue
items.text: Are they all mad? Why would they do this?

items.speaker: Qianyue
items.text: For power? Is it really worth all this?

items.speaker: Qianyue
items.text: For dreams? I doubt these killers know anything about dreams.

items.speaker: Qianyue
items.text: But cities like Jinzhou or Hongzhen offer protection. Folks can go about their daily lives, so why go looking for this kind of trouble?

items.speaker: Qianyue
items.text: I just... can't wrap my head around it. There's no excuse for this.

options.text: We have more important matters to attend to.

items.speaker: Qianyue
items.text: You're right. We have to stop the Fractsidus. We can't let them get away with this.

dialog.stepLabel: Taciturn Artificer: "Boss, all systems are go. We’re ready to roll with the next ..."

items.speaker: Taciturn Artificer
items.text: Boss, all systems are go. We’re ready to roll with the next experiment whenever you give the word.

items.speaker: Muscular Artificer
items.text: Hey, Ogo, it’s showtime!

items.speaker: Ogo
items.text: Me… showtime?

items.speaker: Muscular Artificer
items.text: Who else? You want to live, right? You want power, don’t you? That’s exactly what the Fractsidus is all about.

items.speaker: Muscular Artificer
items.text: We turn the weak into the mighty, the nobodies into somebodies, and mere mortals into… gods.

items.speaker: Muscular Artificer
items.text: Relax, it’s just another tweak. Like the upgrade you had before—only this makes you stronger and less constrained.

items.speaker: Muscular Artificer
items.text: Look at this beast—gorgeous, isn’t it? Strong, too. Those sharp claws, that glossy fur, those bulging muscles…

items.speaker: Muscular Artificer
items.text: Listen, Tacet Discords are not curses, they’re miracles. And now, you get the honor of harnessing that miracle. Don’t let me down.

items.speaker: Ogo
items.text: Can I… really make it?

items.speaker: Muscular Artificer
items.text: Of course, Ogo. The Fractsidus isn’t pouring money into this just for kicks.

items.speaker: Muscular Artificer
items.text: Just fire up that machine over there, and you’ll be... transformed. No one will be able to touch you, much less take you down.

items.speaker: Muscular Artificer
items.text: I'll take it upstairs. Once you get stronger, you'll move up the ladder too. Say goodbye to grunt work.

items.speaker: Ogo
items.text: I… Fine, I'll do it.
Ogo trembles as he approaches the machine. With no other option, he entrusts his fate to this experiment he neither understands nor cares about.

items.speaker: Taciturn Artificer
items.text: Initiating frequency suppressor injection… triple unit. Ogo's frequency detected, causing effective interference with the Tacet Discord's frequency. Synchronization rate: 95.27%.

items.speaker: Muscular Artificer
items.text: HAHAHA! We did it! Such a genius move, using human frequencies to take down Tacet Discord’s!

items.speaker: Muscular Artificer
items.text: As long as Tacet Discords understand our language, we can boss them around however we want!

items.speaker: Muscular Artificer
items.text: Shut down the Photonvault and release our new friend… I mean, old friend! Even that Rover won't stand a chance!
The Artificers turn off the Photonvault.

items.speaker: Muscular Artificer
items.text: Ogo? Can you hear me? How’s your new body feeling? I get it, four legs might be a challenge at first. Take your time.

items.speaker: Taciturn Artificer
items.text: Hold on, boss. Ogo's frequencies… they're gone.

items.speaker: Muscular Artificer
items.text: What? Don’t be stupid. We combined his with the Tacet Discord’s frequencies. Of course you can’t see his, moron!

items.speaker: Taciturn Artificer
items.text: No… the Tacet Discord’s frequencies are unchanged. His were completely devoured.

items.speaker: Muscular Artificer
items.text: This isn’t funny! Ogo, wake up! Now isn’t the time for a nap… No, no… Stay back! STAY BACK!
In those final moments, Ogo's response was neither what he hoped for nor expected.
